Petition For Orders Instructing Executor Regarding Confirmation Of Probate Assests. Gifts To Caregiver, And Listing And Sale Of The Estate'S Real Properties
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 289594. Daniel Conrad appearing for and with executor/trustee David Thompson. Issues addressed. Matter submitted. Counsel will submit revised order in both cases.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Petition For Orders Instructing Executor Regarding Confirmation Of Probate Assests. Gifts To Caregiver, And Listing And Sale Of The Estate'S Real Properties
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Continued To Feb-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Conrad appearing for and with executor David Thompson. Counsel stated his response to the examiner's notes. Court will required filing of a new petition under the Trust. Matter is continued to 2/27/07. The Trust petition will be set on 2/27/07 also. Issue on the $13,000.00 check to the caregiver addressed. That issue is submitted. Request to list and sell the real properties addressed, Court is allowing the executor to go forward to list and sell the real properties subject to determination of probate and trust assets. Counsel will prepare a revised order. Judge Pro Tem: Stella Pantazis. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
